title: juncus dichotomus
intro: Juncus dichotomus, also known as forked rush or forked rush grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, Juncus dichotomus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing swelling and pain, as well as acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Juncus dichotomus is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
